---
title: "22 Jul 2026: Currently working"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-07-22 14:34"
categories: [week_notes]
---

After a very busy few weeks including leave periods, we return to our week notes in a hopefully weekly fashion. Hopefully you didn't miss us too much. (If you skim past this part it looks like we did a lot of work very rapidly)

... The data portal is ready for data!

... We put data in the data portal!

... Immediately we notice Things about the data portal!
